dateRange.description: Date range for the query. Defaults to last 24 hours.

date_from.description: Start of the date range. Accepts ISO 8601 timestamps or relative formats: -1h, -6h, -1d, -7d, etc.

date_to.description: End of the date range. Same format as date_from. Omit or null for "now".

excludeAttributes.description: Omit the per-span attributes and resource attributes maps from results to keep payloads compact. Defaults to false.

offset.description: Pagination offset into the trace's spans (ordered by start time ascending). Each page returns up to 2000 spans; pass the response's `nextOffset` to load the next page. Defaults to 0.
